Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON.
Appearances: Debra V. Achkire of Morgan Stanley Smith Barney (693.6213) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
